  "themes": [
    {
      "id": "A",
      "bar_start": 0,
      "bar_end": 13,
      "description": "Primary ballad theme in D minor; austere, hymn-like texture with parallel octaves in bass and chorale-style upper voices; dark, narrative character inspired by the Scottish ballad 'Edward'; includes chromatic inner-voice motion and a striking harmonic excursion through the relative major and submediant regions before a cadential return"
    },
    {
      "id": "A'",
      "bar_start": 13,
      "bar_end": 26,
      "description": "Restatement of the primary theme with minor textural elaboration; includes an expanded harmonic digression through Bb major (bVI) and a plagal-inflected approach to the dominant; closes with a decisive authentic cadence on D minor at bar 26"
    },
    {
      "id": "B",
      "bar_start": 27,
      "bar_end": 44,
      "description": "Contrasting middle section in D major (modal mixture); stormy, virtuosic character with rapid triplet figurations and ascending sequences; harmonic language intensifies through chromatic sequences ascending by semitone (F#, G#, A#); climactic fff passage with descending sequences before return to d minor; represents the narrative's violent climax"
    },
    {
      "id": "A''",
      "bar_start": 45,
      "bar_end": 59,
      "description": "Recapitulation of the ballad theme in d minor; initially pp with delicate texture; expanded middle section traverses subdominant-inflected harmonies (g minor, Bb major, Eb major) with sustained bass pedals; gradual dissolution of texture toward the coda; marked by extensive use of bVI and iv prolongations"
    },
    {
      "id": "Coda",
      "bar_start": 59,
      "bar_end": 72,
      "description": "Hushed, introspective coda; sparse, fragmentary texture with registral separation between hands; echoes of the main theme in pp dynamic; chromatic inner voice motion; deceptive cadence to bVI at bar 66; final plagal and authentic cadential gestures resolve to D minor; ends ppp with bare tonic sonority"
    }
  ]
}
